Comparative Global Studies I

3 block(s)

Prereq: None

Comparative Global Studies II

3 block(s)

Prereq: Comparative Global Studies I. New 10th graders: an equivalent 9th grade history course.

U.S. History

4 block(s)

Prereq: Comparative Global Studies II. New 11th graders: an equivalent 10th grade history course.

Capstone Seminar: Chocolate City — DC History

2 block(s)

Prereq: U.S. History

Capstone Seminar: Global Justice in a World of Difference

2 block(s)

Prereq: U.S. History

Capstone Seminar: Middle East in Modern Memory

2 block(s)

Prereq: U.S. History

Senior History: Capitalism and Its Critics

1-2 block(s)

Prereq: U.S. History

Senior History: Genocide and Moral Duty

1-2 block(s)

Prereq: U.S. History

Senior History: Gender, Sex, and Activism

1-2 block(s)

Prereq: U.S. History

Senior History: Women, Sports, and American Popular Culture

1-2 block(s)

Prereq: U.S. History

Prereq: None

Capstone Research Seminar

1 block(s)

Prereq: Capstone Seminar course
